Children in HHS Care.note: Test folds fall in a 2025 low-load regime (~2,000-2,600) far below the historical peak-era capacity ceiling of 9000; breach probability against that absolute ceiling is expected to be ~0% in this window. Surge lead time uses a relative, trailing-baseline definition so it remains informative even when the absolute level is low.

Children discharged from HHS Care.note: Test folds fall in a 2025 low-load regime (~2,000-2,600) far below the historical peak-era capacity ceiling of 9000; breach probability against that absolute ceiling is expected to be ~0% in this window. Surge lead time uses a relative, trailing-baseline definition so it remains informative even when the absolute level is low.
